name: TOP_PATHWAYS_LAST_3Y
description: Top pathways last last 3 years. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (ymax:Year)
WITH max(ymax.year) AS max_year
MATCH (pw:Pathway)<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year >= max_year - $years + 1
RETURN pw.name AS pathway, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, collect(DISTINCT tp.name)[0..5] AS example_targetpairs
ORDER BY targetpair_count DESC, patent_count DESC, pathway
LIMIT 10

examples: Across target-pair combinations from the last three years, which pathways appear most often overall? Please provide the top 10 together with example target pairs.
In the last three years, which pathways are most prevalent across all target-pair combinations? Please list the top 10 and show representative matching pairs.
Considering target-pair combinations disclosed over the last three years, what are the top 10 most frequent pathways, and what example target pairs belong to them?
